title: Power
Description
table-718-718.caption: Please list all the superpowers of 3-D Man.
data: 3-D Man possesses superhuman strength, allowing him to lift and move objects far beyond human capabilities.
He can move at speeds exceeding those of a normal human, both in terms of running and reflexes.
3-D Man's agility, balance, and coordination are heightened to superhuman levels.
His body is more resistant to physical injury than a normal human.
He can fly at considerable speeds.
